name: wsd-method
description: Wolff Spec Driven alpha toolkit for agent-governed private repositories.

scripts.test: npm run test:install && npm run test:install-claude && npm run test:install-brownfield && npm run test:install-git-none && npm run test:install-git-basic && npm run test:install-git-full && npm run test:install-party-mode
scripts.test:install: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" check >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-specify/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-design/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-tasks/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/STATE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/PROJECT.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/ROADMAP.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS_PIPELINE.md" && ! test -d "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase" && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/schemas/context.schema.json" && test -x "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" && node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-commit" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/commit-msg" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-push" && test -x "$tmpdir/scripts/git-hooks/pre-commit"'
scripts.test:install-claude: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools claude-code --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-start.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-finish.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-specify.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-design.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-tasks.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/settings.json" && test -x "$tmpdir/+wsd/hooks/pre-tool.sh" && jq -e ".hooks.PreToolUse and .hooks.PreCompact and .hooks.SessionStart and .hooks.Stop" "$tmpdir/.claude/settings.json" >/dev/null && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/schemas/context.schema.json" && node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-commit" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/commit-msg" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-push" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/ROADMAP.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS_PIPELINE.md" && ls "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/idea-"*.md >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-brownfield: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_python_api --brownfield >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/STACK.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/ARCHITECTURE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/CONVENTIONS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/STRUCTURE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/INTEGRATIONS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/CONCERNS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/TESTING.md" && grep -q pytest "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/TESTING.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/ROADMAP.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS_PIPELINE.md" && node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-git-none: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --git-policy none >/dev/null; node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.git_governance.enabled!==false||c.git_governance.mode!==\"none\") process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+context.json"; ! test -d "$tmpdir/.github"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git doctor >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-git-basic: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --git-policy basic >/dev/null; node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.git_governance.enabled!==true||c.git_governance.mode!==\"basic\") process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+context.json"; grep -q "Git/GitHub Governance" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md"; ! test -d "$tmpdir/.github"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git doctor >/dev/null; touch "$tmpdir/dirty.txt"; if "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git preflight >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 1; fi'
scripts.test:install-git-full: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --git-policy full >/dev/null; node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.git_governance.enabled!==true||c.git_governance.mode!==\"full\") process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+context.json"; test -f "$tmpdir/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/task.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/decision.md"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git doctor >/dev/null; git -C "$tmpdir" config user.email wsd@example.invalid; git -C "$tmpdir" config user.name "WSD Test"; printf "base\n" > "$tmpdir/base.txt"; git -C "$tmpdir" add -A; git -C "$tmpdir" commit -m "chore: base" >/dev/null; git -C "$tmpdir" switch -c feat/git-governance-check >/dev/null; printf "demo\n" > "$tmpdir/demo.txt"; git -C "$tmpdir" add -A; git -C "$tmpdir" commit -m "chore: feature" >/dev/null; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git pr-check >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-party-mode: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools claude-code --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-party-mode.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/agents-wsd.csv" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/agents" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/steps" && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/templates/PARTY_ANALYSIS.md.template" && grep -q "Party Mode" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" party status >/dev/null'
